subcodes.first_line: The Sun of the Word hath dawned from the horizon of the All-Merciful's Will with wondrous and sublime effulgence, manifest unto certain among His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمس کلمه از افق مشیت رحمانیه بانوار بدیعه منیعه مشرق و ظاهر بعضی از عباد
subcodes.subjects: @power of love, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
